summary: Tested mobile reaction picker and save button functionality. All backend APIs pass (12/12 tests). Frontend mobile UI tested successfully - reaction button long-press shows emoji picker, emoji selection changes reaction, save button toggles saved state with visual feedback.
critical_code_review_comments: PostModal.js correctly implements touch-manipulation CSS class for reaction button (line 537)
Save button has both onClick and onTouchEnd handlers for mobile compatibility (lines 567-572)
Emoji picker uses proper touch event handling with stopPropagation (lines 486-520)
Long press timer set to 400ms which is appropriate for mobile UX
Reaction button prevents text selection with WebkitTouchCallout and userSelect styles
seed_data_creation: Created test user test_mobile_288@test.com for mobile testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile reaction picker and save functionality verified working. Backend endpoints for save/unsave/reactions all pass. Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_post_reactions_save_iter288.py for regression testing.

tests_performed.details: Bookmark icon turns yellow, 'Saved!' toast appears
Selecting different emoji (🔥) changes reaction icon
Picker closes after selection or X button tap

console_warnings: Unable to preventDefault inside passive event listener invocation - This is expected for touch events and doesn't affect functionality

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/posts/{post_id}: PASS - Includes saved and liked state
